content.en:
Tower of Death.

When Ye Tian entered it, he saw many Great Ancestors sitting on thrones one after another, and in the middle was an independent time and space, where two Fifth Stage Great Ancestors were fighting.

It's not a fight, it's a real fight.

He quickly understood that this so-called Tower of Death was also a kind of gambling ring, but it was of a very high grade, using the fifth stage Great Ancestor.

The strength of these fifth-stage great ancestors is not strong, and it is definitely not the Falcon Dragon City that they came to, but they were forcibly brought in.

Of course, it is not excluded that the Great Ancestor of the resources is willing to come here, just to win a chance, but the possibility is relatively small.

Time passed slowly, and one of the Great Ancestors began to get injured and even began to be on the verge of death.

However, at the critical moment, the opponent suddenly broke out with a powerful immeasurable magic technique, instantly turned the tables, killed the opponent, and won the game.

At this time, Ye Tian saw that many Great Ancestors were scolding angrily, obviously losing a lot of Tongtian Realm gold coins.

Subsequently, he left the Tower of Death and went elsewhere.

There are a lot of places for the entertainment of the fifth stage great ancestor in Falcon Dragon City, this is equivalent to an enlarged version of the weak and mundane life, even if it is a high-ranking fifth-stage immeasurable lifeform, once it comes to Falcon Dragon City, it seems that it is not much different from ordinary creatures.

"For a long and endless time, many fifth-stage Great Ancestors have no hope of becoming Heavenly Ancestors, maybe we can give them a little fun here!" Ye Tian muttered.

In the days that followed, he traded a lot of items here, which he used to exchange for gold coins in the Heavenly Realm.

After all, what you need to participate in the auction is the gold coins of the Heavenly Realm, and you can't do it without the gold coins of the Heavenly Realm.

After a while, the auction of Falcon Dragon City will begin, and this time the auction will take a long time, because there will be a huge number of treasures to be put up for auction.

He had participated in many auctions before, but none of them were as large as this one.

After all, there are still many Heavenly Ancestors participating in this time, how could there be such a grade in the previous auctions!

this day.

The Falcon Dragon City auction has begun, and any invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor can enter without many restrictions.

The number of invincible-level fifth-stage ancestors is not large, that is, the invincible-level fifth-stage ancestors in Falcon Dragon City are relatively concentrated, and it seems that there are more of them.

After Ye Tian entered the auction hall, he saw some invincible-level fifth-stage ancestors of the Huanyu Alliance, so he went over to say hello.

However, he did not see the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

Obviously, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor should not have come to this auction.

Ever since the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor became the Lord of the Realm, he rarely came out.

So, it's normal for him not to come.

Airplanes!

A figure suddenly appeared in the auction hall and sat on a throne above.

"Heavenly Ancestor!"

Many Great Ancestors recognized it.

This is the Junhe Heavenly Ancestor, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Blue Saint Realm.

As time passed, one Heavenly Ancestor after another descended.

"Taichen Heavenly Ancestor is also here!"

Ye Tian said with slight surprise.

This is the founder of the Xuanqi Realm Taichen Palace, and he should not be weak among the Heavenly Ancestors.

"Hahaha, this Heavenly Ancestor Throne, I should be able to sit on it too!"

A Great Ancestor went straight to the Heavenly Ancestor Throne.

"True Night Ancestor!"

The other Great Ancestors recognized it.

This is the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level, the True Night Great Ancestor.

When he was in the Eternal True Ruins, the True Night Ancestor could be said to have snatched some Xuantian Platinum from several Heavenly Ancestors, so several Heavenly Ancestors were very unhappy with him.

However, the Fifth Stage Great Ancestor of the Boundary Breaking Level has the strength to compete with ordinary Heavenly Ancestors, and once he breaks through to the Heavenly Ancestor realm, he is even more than ordinary Heavenly Ancestors.

Therefore, most of the Heavenly Ancestors were still reluctant to provoke the True Night Ancestor.

Soon, another Boundary-Breaking Level Fifth Stage Ancestor appeared.

This person's whole body is snow-white, and even his hair is abnormally snow-white, and even exudes a white light, which is almost impossible to hide.

"Yongxuan Great Ancestor!"

Many great ancestors also recognized it.

And when the True Night Ancestor saw the Yongxuan Great Ancestor, his brows furrowed, obviously he had some trouble dealing with this Yongxuan Great Ancestor.

When the auction was about to start, a total of more than one hundred and twenty Heavenly Ancestors came, and about three thousand Invincible Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestors came.

Swish!

A female Fifth Stage Great Ancestor appeared on the auction table, she was an invincible Level 5 Great Ancestor on the Falcon Dragon City side, and now served as an auctioneer.

Many Great Ancestors also know her, and she is Qingli Great Ancestor.

"Auction begins!"

Qingli Ancestor announced.

From the first auction item, the value of its treasures was not something that ordinary Great Ancestors could imagine, and they were all treasures of great value to the Invincible Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

However, Ye Tian was not interested in these treasures.

He closed his eyes and pondered, waiting for the treasure he needed to come to the fore.

Before I knew it, a long time had passed.

Finally, one of the materials he needed was put up for auction.

"The next auction is the Red Dragon True Water, the Red Dragon True Water is one of the necessary materials for the cultivation of some immeasurable supernatural powers, if used alone, it can also be used to derive the immeasurable supernatural powers, in short, it is very useful. Now the starting price is 1,000,000 Heavenly Realm Gold Coins!"

Qingli Ancestor said.

Ye Tian opened his eyes, and his eyes revealed excitement and eagerness.

Afterwards, the auction began.

However, although the Red Dragon True Water is precious, its greatest use is still for cultivating the Heaven Slaying Blade.

And there are not many great ancestors who have the inheritance of the Heaven Slaying Blade, and even fewer are qualified to cultivate.

Therefore, there were not many Great Ancestors who competed with Ye Tian.

In the end, he bid for this piece of Red Dragon True Water at a price of more than 3.8 million Heavenly Realm gold coins.

With the Red Dragon True Water in hand, he only had the last two materials left to gather all the materials needed to cultivate the Heaven Slaying Blade.

The auction continues!

A large number of treasures were auctioned one by one, and another material that Ye Tian needed was auctioned.

"Void Shadow Liquid!"

This kind of treasure is also the material needed to cultivate the Heaven Slaying Blade, and now it has also been encountered.

As a result, Ye Tian began to compete for this Void Shadow Liquid again, and finally won the auction for more than four million Heavenly Realm gold coins.

"Only the Immortal Boundary Stone is left!"

Ye Tian was looking forward to the remaining auction items including the Immortal Boundary Stone.

However, all the way to the back, there was no existence of the Immortal Boundary Stone.

Moreover, the value of the items auctioned later is obviously above the Immortal Boundary Stone, so it is unlikely that the Immortal Boundary Stone will appear.

"After the auction is over, let's see if we can trade the Immortal Boundary Stone!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
